summary: Issue #402 Phase 2.6 fulfillment/promotion Decision workflows: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. process_order_5 FBS + FBT scaffold; promotion 7a/7c/7b branches and tool keys; shared card Approve contract updated; 5/5 ACs mapped; demo targeted tests green. No CRITICAL reliability/security findings on mock-only Demo surface.

mappings.criterion: labels FBT scaffold as unfilled and cites unresolved SLA trigger without inventing thresholds
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/lib/workflows/process-order/__tests__/review.test.ts::labels FBT scaffold as unfilled and cites unresolved SLA trigger without inventing thresholds

mappings.criterion: returns five stages for workflow 7a with analytics deep-link
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/lib/workflows/create-activity/__tests__/review.test.ts::returns five stages for workflow 7a with analytics deep-link

mappings.criterion: makes no backend request or real write anywhere in the recommendations flow
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::makes no backend request or real write anywhere in the recommendations flow

mappings.criterion: enables Approve for Workflows 1-5 and promotion 7a/7c/7b and routes to the review page
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/decisions-recommendations.test.tsx::enables Approve for Workflows 1-5 and promotion 7a/7c/7b and routes to the review page

mappings.criterion: completes five-stage review and routes to In Progress on Approve
mappings.test: apps/demo/src/__tests__/workflow-5-review-approve-in-progress.test.tsx::completes five-stage review and routes to In Progress on Approve

recommendations: Optional later cleanup: parameterize duplicated workflow-*-review-approve-in-progress harnesses.
Optional: share FBT_PROMOTION_SCAFFOLD_UNFILLED constant across promotion review modules.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; 5/5 ACs mapped; targeted demo tests green. Approve merge for #402.

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged review PASS; WF5 + promotion 7a/7c/7b mock Decision lifecycle verified.
